body.title: Fix: replay.py calls log_error() with positional args (keyword-only function)
body.description:
replay.py (consolidation replay) calls log_error() with positional args at 5 call sites. log_error() takes keyword-only args (kind=, detail=). Results in TypeError caught by push_sources.py's bare except and re-logged as BARE_EXCEPT, generating noise in errors.log.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/replay.py (5 call sites)
**Design rules:** docs-in-code
**Scope boundary:** IN — convert 5 positional log_error() calls to keyword form. OUT — refactoring log_error signature.
**Test plan:** AST check confirms no positional log_error() calls in replay.py; BARE_EXCEPT for 'log_error() takes 0 positional arguments' stops appearing.
